info.title: E-commerce Price Tracker API
info.description: E-commerce Price Tracker API. Extracts product price, title, availability, rating, images, and seller info from any e-commerce product page. Uses schema.org, Open Graph, and DOM heuristics. Supports Amazon, Shopify, WooCommerce, and generic stores. Send a JSON POST request and receive a structured JSON response. Pricing, quotas, authentication, and subscriptions are handled by .

post.description: Extracts product price, title, availability, rating, images, and seller info from any e-commerce product page. Uses schema.org, Open Graph, and DOM heuristics. Supports Amazon, Shopify, WooCommerce, and generic stores.

url.description: Public HTTP or HTTPS website URL to analyze.

200.description: Successful JSON response from the API.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded for the current plan.

parameters.name: X-RapidAPI-Key
parameters.description: RapidAPI application key. RapidAPI injects this for subscribed consumers.

parameters.name: X-RapidAPI-Host
parameters.description: RapidAPI host for this API listing.
